series_metadata.series_description: File contains information regarding application, testing, and certification of individuals certified to enforce the building code, including continuing education.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine readable data records on computer data base system until information is superseded by new information or until record series is no longer created, then destroy by erasure ; Paper: Retain 2 years after records becomes inactive, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
